faqs.question: How much does clothes moth control cost in Edison, NJ?
faqs.answer: Clothes moth control in Edison typically ranges from $550 to $5,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, the size of your property, and the number of treatments required. A small closet infestation may cost around $550–$800, while whole-home treatments or severe commercial infestations can reach $5,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Edison properties.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have a clothes moth infestation in my Edison home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include small irregular holes in wool, silk, or cotton clothing; silky tubes or cases in closet corners; webbing on fabric surfaces; and small beige or gold moths flying near wardrobes. You may also notice larvae (small caterpillar-like insects) on clothing or shed casings in drawers. If you notice any of these signs in your Edison home, contact us immediately for an inspection.

faqs.question: Are clothes moth treatments safe for my family and pets in Edison?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products and integrated pest management techniques that are safe for your family, pets, and delicate fabrics when applied by our trained professionals. Many of our treatments focus on non-chemical methods like targeted heat treatments, vacuuming, and pheromone traps. We always discuss treatment options and safety protocols with Edison homeowners before beginning service.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a clothes moth problem in Edison?
faqs.answer: We typically offer same-day or next-day service for Edison residents experiencing clothes moth problems. Because moth larvae cause ongoing damage to fabrics, quick intervention is essential to minimize loss. Our team serves all Edison neighborhoods promptly, and emergency appointments are available for severe infestations affecting valuable clothing collections or business inventory.
